data.text: P04/08 ANOTHER FELISIAN. DARK AND BROODING APPEARING FROM ORBIT. HAS
A MEDIUM SIZED RING. AT 346.63 IT WAS ROLLING AND HILLY BARREN WITH
ICE PONDS, A SLINKING HOPPER SIGHTED. 291.35 MOUNTAINOUS WITH AN
ENORMOUS GORGE YOU CAN SEE WHILE LANDING. 159.100 VERY HILLY, GRASSY
WITH TALL TREES WITH COLORFUL LEAVES AND TRANSPARENT TRUNKS, HOPPER
